body.title: Migrate all IGOR_DB_PATH usages to make_home_proxy (D224 completion)
body.result: Migrated all IGOR_DB_PATH usages to Cortex(None)/make_home_proxy() across 20 files. Fixed 2 pre-existing Postgres bugs (bare % in LIKE, json.loads on dict). 457 tests pass.
body.description: D224 retired SQLite but 9+ files still use IGOR_DB_PATH to construct Cortex connections. When IGOR_DB_PATH is unset (correct post-D224), these all return None and do nothing silently. Reading pipeline affected: graph_integrator.py, reading_indexer.py, self_test.py, blob_store.py, find_it.py. Tools affected: runner.py, github.py, interpretive.py, google_contacts.py, metrics.py, os_primitives.py. Fix: replace IGOR_DB_PATH-based Cortex construction with make_home_proxy() directly (no db_path arg needed — reads IGOR_HOME_DB_URL). All reading pipeline deposits (FACT_CLOUD nodes, co-occurrence edges) may not have landed in Postgres. After fix: verify FACT_CLOUD count in Postgres matches expectation. IGOR_HOME_DB_URL=postgresql://igor:choose_a_password@127.0.0.1/igor_wild_0001
